name: Excellent Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1) Thoroughly cream the first six ingredients together.
2) Sift flour, baking soda, and salt. Add to the creamed mixture.
3) Form dough into 1-inch balls. Roll in granulated sugar. Place cookies 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet. Use a fork to criss-cross the tops.
4) Bake at 350 degrees F for 10 to 12 minutes.
